name: Dripify

auth.notes: No public first-party API authentication docs were found during this audit.

rateLimits: No public first-party API rate limit documentation found.
notes: Dripify appears integration-led rather than docs-retrieval-ready for agents.
Official docs emphasize product usage plus Zapier and Make integrations.
GitHub fallback search did not surface a strong maintained community MCP, CLI, SDK, or API wrapper.
reviewReason: Confirm whether Dripify has private or customer-only API docs that are not publicly indexed.
